title: AutoBEE: A hierarchical multi-agent approach for energy and environmental parameter analysis
inputData: IDF文件（EnergyPlus模型）+文本（自然语言指令）
contribution: 分层多智能体系统（AutoBEE）高效处理建筑能耗和环境参数分析，显著提升设计决策质量
pdfFile: Quan et al. - 2025 - AutoBEE A hierarchical multi-agent approach for energy and environmental parameter analysis.pdf
markdownFile: Quan et al. - 2025 - AutoBEE A hierarchical multi-agent approach for energy and environmental parameter analysis.md
abstract: This study develops AutoBEE, an automated analysis framework for building energy consumption and environmental parameters based on a hierarchical multi-agent system integrated with large language models. The framework achieves fully autonomous operation from natural language input to structured building performance report output through a multi-level team-based architecture, a lightweight communication protocol, and a comprehensive agent tool library covering IDF file modification, EnergyPlus simulation, and data analysis.
methodology: A hierarchical multi-agent system (AutoBEE) built on the LangGraph framework with GPT-4o, organizing specialized agents into planning, supervision, modification, simulation, and reporting teams, enhanced by Chain-of-Thought prompting, RAG for standards compliance, and a lightweight information-hiding communication protocol.
results: Validated across 54 typical building performance analysis scenarios, AutoBEE achieved 100% accuracy, 10-20x speed improvement over manual methods (processing in 50-99 seconds), superior content richness and rationality compared to human experts, and controlled token costs (mostly $0.069-$0.098 per task) through the information-hiding strategy.
inputDataEn: IDF files (EnergyPlus models) + text (natural language instructions)
